title: Intelligent Power ICs for Wide-Bandgap Devices
description:
• Next-generation smart switches.
• Monolithic and heterogeneous integration.
• Thermal management and multi-physics analysis.
• Device reliability and aging detection.
• Advanced packaging.

title: Multi-physics Sensing and Predictive Control
description:
• Advanced sensing circuits for multi-phase current balancing.
• Integrated SenseFET and DCR sensing methodologies.
• Predictive and robust control algorithms.
• Temp-coefficient compensation and on-chip LC design.

title: AI-Assisted Power Applications
description:
• AI agents for autonomous measurement and dynamic control.
• Neural-network-based transient tuning.
• Advanced optimization algorithms for power application.

title: Emerging Novel Applications
description:
• Power solutions for high-speed optical communication systems.
• Aerospace and deep-space electronics.
• High-density power systems for humanoid robots.
• Wide temp range applications.
